elements.name: TC556255 - Validate Location Bulk Assignment fields and complete assignment

steps.name: I login with username "george.parker" and password "Password123#"
I should see the dashboard
I navigate to Bulk Assignments via the ellipsis menu
I am on the Bulk Assignments page
I should see the Bulk Assignments page title
I should see the Assign Location button
I should see the Assign Staff button
I should see the Unassign Location button
I should see the Unassign Staff button
I should see the Export button
I should see the Advanced Search button
I click the Advanced Search button
the Advanced Search panel should be visible
I click the Search button in Advanced Search
search results should be displayed or empty message shown
I select the first available record if results exist
I note the current selection count
I click the Assign Location button
the Location Bulk Assignments modal displays

result.error_message:
locator.waitFor: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for locator('mat-dialog-container') to be visible[22m

    at BulkAssignmentPage.verifyModalOpened (C:\Whitelisted\katalon-to-playwright\katalon-to-playwright\testExecution copy\src\pages\BulkAssignmentPage.ts:157:68)
    at World.<anonymous> (C:\Whitelisted\katalon-to-playwright\katalon-to-playwright\testExecution copy\src\steps\bulk-assignment.steps.ts:480:28)

steps.name: I verify Assignment Type is a required single select dropdown
I verify Location is a required single select dropdown
I verify Effective Start Date is a required date field
I verify Note field allows maximum 10000 characters
I fill in the Location Assignment form with valid data
I click Continue on the modal
a confirmation modal displays with text "You are about to assign a location to the selected member records"
I click Continue on confirmation
the assignment status is displayed
I click the Close button
the modal should close
the Bulk Assignments list is NOT refreshed
previously selected records remain selected
